testedConfigurations: CloudEOS version 4.29 on QEMU version 2.0.0 on Linux 3.10.0-1160.el7.x86_64 running on a Supermicro SYS-1029U-TR-CTO with an Intel Xeon Gold 6240R with PAA CloudEOS version 4.29 on QEMU version 2.0.0 on Linux 3.10.0-1160.el7.x86_64 running on a Supermicro SYS-1029U-TR-CTO with an Intel Xeon Gold 6240R without PAA
certificate.moduleName: Arista Crypto Module v3.0 [Software, Software IPsec]
certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode. No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys)
certificate.description: Arista's crypto library is a comprehensive suite of FIPS Approved algorithms. Many key sizes and modes have been implemented to allow flexibility and efficiency. This validation is for the library contained within the CloudEOS Router products and all its related SKUs, which includes SS-CLOUDEOS-VR-CV-100M-B-1M, SS-CLOUDEOS-VR-CVS-100M-B-1M, SS-CLOUDEOS-VR-CV-1G-B-1M, SS-CLOUDEOS-VR-CVS-1G-B-1M, SS-CLOUDEOS-VR-CV-10G-B-1M, SS-CLOUDEOS-VR-CVS-10G-B-1M, SS-CVPATH-CloudEOS-100M-E-CVS-B-1M, SS-CVPATH-CloudEOS-1G-E-CVS-B-1M, SS-CVPATH-CloudEOS-10G-E-CVS-B-1M and any other future SKUs which use the validated library for the CloudEOS Router product.

services.name: Non-Approved Mode
services.approvedFunctions: The status indicator is a return value 0 from the FIPS_mode() function.

services.name: KAS- ECC
services.description: SP 800-56Arev3. KAS_ECC_SSC per IG D.F Scenario 2, path (2). No key confirmation, key derivation per IG 2.4.B. SP 800-135. KDFs (TLS 1.0/1.1, 1.2, SSHv2, IKE v1, IKE v2)
services.properties: P-256, P-384, P-521 curves providing 128, 192, or 256 bits of encryption strength

extraColumns.col8: KAS-ECC-SSC Sp800-56Ar3/A3592 KDF IKEv1/A3592 KDF IKEv2/A3592 KDF SSH/A3592 KDF TLS/A3592 TLS v1.2 KDF RFC7627/A3592

services.name: KAS- FFC
services.description: SP 800-56Arev3. KAS_FFC_SSC per IG D.F Scenario 2, path (2). No key confirmation, key derivation per IG 2.4.B. SP 800-135. KDFs (TLS 1.0/1.1, 1.2, SSHv2, IKE v1, IKE v2)
services.properties: 2048, 3072, 4096, 6144, and 8192-bit moduli providing 112, 128, 152, 176, or 200 bits of encryption strength

extraColumns.col8: KAS-FFC-SSC Sp800-56Ar3/A3592 KDF IKEv1/A3592 KDF IKEv2/A3592 KDF SSH/A3592 KDF TLS/A3592 TLS v1.2 KDF RFC7627/A3592

services.name: KTS-IFC
services.description: SP 800-56Brev2. KTS-IFC (key encapsulation and un-encapsulation) per IG D.G.
services.properties: 2048, 3072, and 4096-bit moduli providing 112, 128, or 152 bits of encryption strength

services.name: TLS- KTS
services.description: SP 800-38D and SP 800-38F. KTS (key wrapping and unwrapping) per IG D.G, Additional Comment 8.
services.properties: 128 and 256-bit keys providing 128 or 256 bits of encryption strength

services.name: SSHv2- KTS
services.description: SP 800-38D and SP 800-38F. KTS (key wrapping and unwrapping) per IG D.G, Additional Comment 8.
services.properties: 128, 192, 256-bit keys providing 128, 192, or 256 bits of encryption strength

services.name: IPsec- KTS
services.description: SP 800-38D and SP 800-38F. KTS (key wrapping and unwrapping) per IG D.G, Additional Comment 8.
services.properties: 128, 192, 256-bit keys providing 128, 192, or 256 bits of encryption strength

services.name: Conditional Error
services.indicator: Error message is placed into the error queue and an error is returned from the API.

extraColumns.col6: The module generates a new key and tests the key via a PCT. If the test fails, an error is returned.

services.name: PreOp Error
services.indicator: Error message is output on stderr.

extraColumns.col6: The module is aborted – restart module

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.name: AES-GCM
approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: Authenticated Encrypt, Authenticated Decrypt, Message Authentication

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.name: AES-XTS Testing Revision 2.0
approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: Confidentiality on storage devices only [XTS-AES is compliant to IG C.I by checking for Key_1 ≠ Key_2.]

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.name: Counter DRBG
approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: Deterministic Random Bit Generation [Module defaults to Counter DRBG with 256- bit security strength]

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: Message Authentication, KDF primitive, integrity test

approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.name: CKG [IG D.H]
approvedAlgorithmsDetailed.useFunction: Cryptographic key generation per SP 800-133rev2 and IG D.I * Generation of asymmetric keys for signature generation per [133] section 5.1. * Generation of asymmetric keys for key establishment per [133] section 5.2. * Symmetric key derivation for industry standard protocols from a key agreement shared secret per [133] section 6.2.1. * Symmetric key derivation from existing key per [133] section 6.2.2.

Single Approved Mode – selected by calling the FIPS_mode_set( 1) function.

The status indicator is a return value 0 from the FIPS_mode() function.
